packs.name: privacy-extreme
packs.author: RegiLattice Official
packs.description: Advanced privacy hardening beyond standard settings. Disables AppCompat inventory, handwriting cloud sharing, keyboard typing insights, input personalisation sync, and WER diagnostics queuing.

packs.name: gaming-fps
packs.author: RegiLattice Official
packs.description: Aggressive FPS and latency optimizations for competitive gaming. Enables HAGS, disables Game DVR, enables game mode priority, tunes memory, and disables Game Bar overhead.

packs.name: enterprise-soc2
packs.author: RegiLattice Official
packs.description: Registry hardening tweaks aligned with SOC 2 Type II control requirements. Enforces NTLMv2, disables WDigest credential caching, requires SMB signing, enforces safe DLL search order, and enables TLS strong cryptography.

packs.name: developer-full
packs.author: RegiLattice Official
packs.description: Comprehensive developer workflow optimizations. Enables long path support, UTF-8 active code page, PowerShell script block logging, .NET developer mode errors, and ANSI escape codes in the Windows console.

packs.name: accessibility-inclusive
packs.author: RegiLattice Official
packs.description: Inclusive accessibility optimizations for users who rely on keyboard navigation, screen readers, or visual-assist features. Enables Toggle Keys audio, disables StickyKeys dialogs, enables Mouse Keys, configures FilterKeys, and enables caret browsing.
